name: Eliot White
learned: Eliot White is a researcher who has devoted his career to understanding extraterrestrial phenomena. He is particularly obsessed with uncovering the origins of alien artifacts and is known for his unconventional approaches to research.
currently: Eliot is working at the Arctic Research Station, where he is determined to unlock the secrets of the alien artifact. His days are filled with intense research sessions, often losing track of time as he delves into the artifact's characteristics and potential implications.
lifestyle: Eliot's routine is fueled by his passion for research. He wakes up late, around 10am, and often works through meals, forgetting to eat until late afternoon. He enjoys engaging in stimulating conversations with colleagues and is known to pull all-nighters when engrossed in his work.
